description: Output schema for social encounter results

outcome_schema.disposition_change: number — shift in NPC attitude (-1, 0, or +1)
outcome_schema.new_disposition: string — updated NPC attitude after shift
information_revealed: string — each piece of information the NPC shared
outcome_schema.npc_reaction: string — brief description of NPC's emotional response
outcome_schema.follow_up_available: boolean — whether more conversation is possible

result_code_rules.strong_success: roll >= DC + 5 — disposition +1, all topic info revealed
result_code_rules.success: roll >= DC — disposition +1, primary info revealed
result_code_rules.failure: roll < DC — no shift, no info revealed
result_code_rules.critical_failure: roll < DC - 5 — disposition -1, NPC may become hostile
